---
title: "D&D 5e Character Sheet"
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
---

```{r setup}
library(yaml)
ch <- yaml.load_file("character.yml")

mod     <- function(score) floor((score - 10) / 2)
mod_str <- function(score) { m <- mod(score); if (m >= 0) paste0("+", m) else as.character(m) }
pb      <- ceiling(ch$level / 4) + 1
```

```{r sheet, results='asis'}
source("R/render_sheet.R")
render_sheet(ch, pb, mod, mod_str)
```
